content:
Hello! I am wondering if there is a way to download an app that I use online as it is? The creator of it just increased the price to $60 per month up from $10 so I am priced out. There are no other similar apps unfortunately- it's kind of a niche subject. It's now 2x the cost of a premium photoshop monthly subscription for an app nowhere near as powerful.
Let me know!

  submitted by   /u/Different_Fix_3629
[link]   [comments]
